title: Drunk Driver Hits Union County Deputy; ICE Detainer Issued
summary: A Union County deputy was struck by a suspected drunk driver. The suspect is being held on an ICE detainer.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers faced by law enforcement and raises questions about immigration enforcement policies.

title: Shooting in West Charlotte Leaves One Seriously Injured
summary: A shooting on Carlyle Drive in west Charlotte resulted in serious injuries to one person, prompting a CMPD investigation.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about public safety and gun violence in the Charlotte area.

title: Cabarrus County Schools Cap Enrollment Due to Overcrowding
summary: Due to overcrowding, Cabarrus County Schools is capping enrollment at two Odell schools, redirecting new students.
charlotte_impact: Indicates growing population and strain on school infrastructure, impacting families and future planning.

title: Warm Spring Weather Expected with Rain Chances
summary: The region will experience unseasonably warm temperatures, peaking at 84, with possible showers and storms mid-week and Friday.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather information relevant to daily planning and awareness of potential weather hazards.

title: Tiawana Brown's Daughter to Appear in Fraud Case Plea Hearing
summary: The daughter of Tiawana Brown is scheduled for a plea hearing on Wednesday, April 1 at 11 a.m. in a fraud scheme case.
charlotte_impact: Follows up on a previous fraud case, highlighting ongoing legal proceedings and potential consequences.

title: Infant Mortality Disparities Persist in Mecklenburg County
summary: Despite overall improvements, Mecklenburg County continues to face health disparities that endanger Black infants.
charlotte_impact: Addresses critical public health issue, emphasizing racial disparities and the need for targeted interventions.

title: School Board Member's Islamophobic Post Sparks Outrage
summary: A Gastonia school board member faces scrutiny and calls for resignation after a controversial Islamophobic social media post.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about discrimination and the need for accountability among public officials.

title: Corning, Meta Break Ground on Optical Cable Plant in Hickory
summary: Corning and Meta are building the world's largest optical cable plant in Hickory to support AI data centers, meeting rising corporate demand.
charlotte_impact: Signals economic growth and investment in the region, driven by the increasing demand for data infrastructure.

title: Charlotte Drivers React to Rising Gas Prices
summary: Gas prices in Charlotte top $4 nationwide, influenced by the war in Iran and trade route disruptions.
charlotte_impact: Impacts cost of living for residents and reflects global geopolitical tensions affecting local economies.

title: South Iredell Teacher Recognized as Hometown Hero
summary: Mariah Johnson, a teacher, bus driver, coach, and civic leader, is recognized as a Hyundai Hometown Hero.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the positive contributions of local educators and community leaders.

title: New Committee to Oversee Transit Safety in Charlotte
summary: A new transit safety committee in Charlotte will review policies and a federal audit to improve CATS operations.
charlotte_impact: Addresses public safety concerns related to public transportation and aims to improve service quality.

title: Duke Energy Rate Hike Proposal Sparks Debate
summary: Duke Energy's proposal for a multi-step rate increase, potentially raising residential bills by 18%, is under debate.
charlotte_impact: Impacts household budgets and raises questions about energy affordability and corporate responsibility.

title: Shooting Near Uptown Apartment Complex Injures One
summary: A shooting near an Uptown apartment complex on West Fifth Street injured one person early Tuesday morning.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about public safety and gun violence in the Uptown area.

title: Union County Breaks Ground on Food Innovation Center
summary: Union County breaks ground on a Food Innovation Center to boost local agriculture, create jobs, and expand entrepreneurship.
charlotte_impact: Supports local economic development and strengthens the regional food economy.

title: Cornelius Police Investigate Gun Shop Burglary
summary: Cornelius police are searching for suspects involved in a burglary at Harrison Precision on Old Statesville Road.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about crime and gun control in the community.
